title: Beyond the Biennale: How murals are rewriting Kochi’s streets
summary: As the Kochi Muziris Biennale spills beyond gallery walls, artists and collectives turn Fort Kochi and Mattancherry into a living canvas shaped by community, politics and time.

title: Man arrested for allegedly molesting Malayalam actor in Kochi
summary: Police say the accused had been repeatedly sending messages to the actor on a social media platform, and she had blocked him

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Constituency Watch – a compilation
summary: Tune in to The Hindu’s Constituency Watch segment to follow our on-ground Assembly election coverage

title: Residents demand desilting of Velachery lake as flooding, infra issues remain major concerns
summary: Velachery, which became a separate constituency in 2008, lags behind on various fronts, say residents; they are worried by the routine flooding of the area, poor road conditions, and heavy traffic congestion caused largely by encroachments

title: Assembly election LIVE: TMC releases first list of candidates ahead of Assam Assembly elections
summary: In Puducherry, Union Minister Mansukh Mandaviya declared that the NDA would contest the upcoming Assembly polls under the leadership of current Chief Minister N. Rangasamy.

title: Under fire over links with rape accused godman, Maharashtra women’s panel chief quits
summary: Party has asked her to resign on moral grounds, say NCP sources

title: PM Modi, President Murmu extend Id-ul-Fitr greetings
summary: President Murmu urged all to resolve to promote unity and harmony in society and contribute to the nation’s progress

title: Arms, ammunition, 50 IEDs seized in Manipur
summary: Security forces have been conducting search operations in Manipur since ethnic violence broke out two years ago
